sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_list (id INTEGER, values LISTINTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_list VALUES (1, [5, 2, 9, NULL, 3]), (2, [7, NULL, 1, 8, 4]);
SELECT id, array_reverse_sort(values) AS sorted_values FROM test_list;
UPDATE test_list SET values = array_reverse_sort([10, 20, NULL, 5]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_reverse_sort(values) AS sorted_values FROM test_list WHERE id = 2;
